title: Junior Business Development Manager at Synergy Property Development

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Synergy Property Development
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
